name: The Tavern of Magic
short_description: Welcome to the Tavern! Craft, buy or sell Magic Cards to form your perfect deck and conquer other mages in Duels. Crawl together through Dungeons and more.
detailed_description:
EARLY BIRDS

Hello to all our Guests!
We appreciate your support on early stages of development.
Therefore not only all items and cards you've collected will stay with you after Prime Time, but we will also try to give you more rare and usefull things after release.


Just Updated

Hi there! We are ready to go on Early Access page and we want to be honest with you about what are you getting.
What you are able to do in game right now:

  • Create and Join Servers
  • Dueling in the Tavern 1v1
  • Crawl through pre-made Dungeon
What will come in 2019
  • More Cards
  • More Weapons
  • Procedurally generated Dungeons
  • PvPvE Dungeons (4v4)
  • 2v2 and 4v4 Duels
  • Crafting System
  • Economics
    And More!
    Follow us on social media! All links are on our web site.


    About the Game

    Welcome to the Tavern!

    The Tavern of Magic is Multiplayer-oriented CCG/Dungeon Crawler for VR.
    Bring your friend and fight in Duels or crawl thru Dungeon together!
    This game is currently in Early Access, but we are updating and bringing new content constantly!
    When this Game will leave Early Access you will be able to:
    • Collect, buy or sell Magic Cards, form your perfect deck and conquer other mages in Duels.
    • Crawl together thru Dungeons, defeat various enemies, seize their souls into your Card deck and use them in Battles.

    • PvP Duels, 2v2, the Tavern Brawl
    • PvE Dungeons (4 co-op or 4v4 "Mirrored Dungeon")
about_the_game:
Welcome to the Tavern!

The Tavern of Magic is Multiplayer-oriented CCG/Dungeon Crawler for VR.
Bring your friend and fight in Duels or crawl thru Dungeon together!
This game is currently in Early Access, but we are updating and bringing new content constantly!
When this Game will leave Early Access you will be able to:
  • Collect, buy or sell Magic Cards, form your perfect deck and conquer other mages in Duels.
  • Crawl together thru Dungeons, defeat various enemies, seize their souls into your Card deck and use them in Battles.

  • PvP Duels, 2v2, the Tavern Brawl
  • PvE Dungeons (4 co-op or 4v4 "Mirrored Dungeon")
